name: Sinclair, Inc.
business: Sinclair is a diversified media company that provides content (programming, local news, sports) on its television stations and digital platforms, and earns revenue from advertising sales and distribution fees from multichannel video programming distributors (MVPDs), virtual MVPDs, and other over-the-top (OTT) distributors.
sellsTo: Local and national advertisers (core and political)
Distributors (cable, satellite, vMVPDs, OTT) for retransmission consent
Subscribers of Tennis Channel and other cable networks

exposures.sentence: NextGen TV is capable of merging broadcast and broadband content and data services using over-the-air spectrum and Internet-provided data connectivity, allowing a mature broadcast industry to reinvent itself due to its mobility, addressability, capacity, Internet Protocol (IP) connectivity, and conditional access.
We maintain a cyber risk management program designed to identify, assess, manage, mitigate, and respond to cybersecurity threats.
We are subject to risks related to our use of AI, which is in the early stages of commercial use.
Sinclair is a diversified media company with national reach and a strong focus on providing high-quality content on our local television stations and digital platform.

catalysts.event: Renewed affiliation agreements with NBC for 21 owned/operated stations and 5 market service agreements
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, Sinclair and NBC announced a comprehensive multi-year agreement that renews station affiliation agreements for 21 of SBG's owned and/or operated NBC affiliates and affiliations in five markets where SBG provides sales and other services under a joint sales agreement or marketing service agreement.

catalysts.event: Formed EdgeBeam Wireless joint venture to provide wireless data services using NextGen TV spectrum
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, Sinclair joined with three broadcast peers and merged BitPath to form a new company, EdgeBeam Wireless, to provide robust wireless data services to a wide range of businesses and industries across the country.

catalysts.event: Acquired license assets of WOLF, WQMY, WGFL from New Age Media
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, Sinclair acquired the license assets of WOLF in Hazleton, PA, WQMY in Williamsport, PA, and WGFL in High Springs, FL from New Age Media, LLC.

catalysts.event: FCC granted application to acquire WHAM, WGTU, WEYI; expected to close immediately
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the FCC granted Sinclair's application to acquire WHAM in Rochester, NY, WGTU in Traverse City, MI and WEYI in Flint, MI. Sinclair currently provides services to these stations under JSAs and SSAs, however will look to close the transactions immediately.
